mnemonics: Conflict Serializable Schedules are VALUABLE: View them through a Precedence Graph to check for cycles. (VALUABLE stands for Viewing Acyclic Lists Understands Bad Cycles Easily)
keyPoints: A schedule is conflict serializable if its precedence graph is acyclic (has no cycles).
A schedule is view serializable if it is view equivalent to some serial schedule.
Every conflict serializable schedule is also view serializable, but not every view serializable schedule is conflict serializable.
commonMistakes: Assuming that because a schedule is view serializable, it is also conflict serializable.
Forgetting that a cycle in the precedence graph means the schedule is NOT conflict serializable.
Equating serializability with simply being a correct schedule, ignoring the need for recoverability and cascadeless properties.
